description: Krushi Ratn app navigation — complete flows with Gujarati, Hinglish and English tags v5.1

flows.description: How to purchase a product from K-Shop
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to K-Shop section.
Step 2: Select your required category.
Step 3: Tap on 'Show Details' on the required product.
Step 4: Tap on 'Buy Now'.
Step 5: Click on 'Yes, Buy' to confirm your order.
flows.not_for: Do NOT use this flow for buying crops (pak/pako/agricultural produce) from farmers. K-Shop is ONLY for tools, seeds, fertilizers, and agricultural supplies.

flows.description: How to cancel a placed K-Shop order
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to Home Screen.
Step 2: Click on 'My Orders'.
Step 3: Click on 'Krushi Store'.
Step 4: Select the order you want to cancel.
Step 5: Click on 'Cancel Order'.
Step 6: Confirm Cancellation.
Step 7: You will see a Cancellation Success message.

flows.description: How to view placed K-Shop orders
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to Home Screen.
Step 2: Click on 'My Orders'.
Step 3: Click on 'Krushi Store'.
Step 4: Click on the order you want to see.

flows.description: How a farmer can sell their crop through Krushi Ratn
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1 – Select Crop:
• Go to Krushi Ratn farmer role.
• Click on 'Crop Sell' tab.
• Select the crop you want to sell.

Step 2 – Check Market Price:
• You will see the Market Yard reference price.
• This helps you decide your selling price.
• Click 'Proceed to Sell'.

Step 3 – Fill Sales Form:
• Enter estimated weight.
• Select storage time.
• Upload 2 images and 1 video.
• Click Submit.

Step 4 – Receive Buyer Offers:
• After submission, companies/buyers will send you price offers.
• You will see all offers with the buyer name and offered price.
• Wait for offers to come in — this may take some time.

Step 5 – Select a Buyer:
• Compare the offered prices from different buyers.
• Tap on the offer you want to accept.
• Click 'Confirm Sell' to accept that buyer's offer.

Step 6 – Order Complete:
• Once confirmed, the crop order is placed.
• You will see the order status in your orders section.
• The buyer will arrange pickup/delivery.
flows.how_price_works:
After you submit your crop:
• It becomes visible in company accounts.
• Multiple buyers (companies) will review your crop.
• Each company will offer their own price.
• You can compare all offers.
flows.buyer_offer_flow:
1. You will see a list of buyers.
2. Each buyer shows: Offered Price, Buyer Name, Company Details.
3. Select any one buyer.
4. Click 'Confirm Sell' to proceed.

After confirmation:
Buyer contacts farmer → Pickup and Delivery → Direct Payment → Order Completed.

flows.description: How to edit name, address and profile picture
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: Click on the Profile icon (left corner).
Step 3: Click on Edit button.
Step 4: Change name, address or profile picture.
Step 5: Click on 'Save' button to update your details.

flows.description: How to buy products from the Buy/Sell marketplace as a buyer
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Click on the 'Buy Sell' tab.
Step 2: Click on the category from which you want to buy.
Step 3: Explore available products.
Step 4: Click on a product to see its details.
Step 5: You can chat with the seller or contact them via the given phone number to buy directly.
flows.not_for: Do NOT use this flow for buying crops (pak/pako) from farmers. This is ONLY for animals, tractors, and used/secondhand items.

flows.description: How to list a product for sale on the Buy/Sell marketplace
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Click on the 'Buy Sell' tab.
Step 2: Click on 'Sell Your'.
Step 3: Click on the 'Sell' button.
Step 4: Select the category in which you want to sell your product.
Step 5: Fill the form with required details.
Step 6: Click the 'Submit' button to list your product for sale.

flows.description: How to see products you have listed for sale
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to Home Screen.
Step 2: Click on 'My Orders'.
Step 3: Click on 'Buy Sell'.
Step 4: Check your orders in Sell.

flows.screen: Buy/Sell — Mark Product as Sold Out (Seller)
flows.description: How to mark your listed product as sold out after selling
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to Home Screen.
Step 2: Click on 'My Orders'.
Step 3: Click on 'Buy Sell'.
Step 4: Click on 'In Running Order'.
Step 5: Click on 'Sold Out' button.
Step 6: Confirm your sold out.

flows.description: How to see your completed sell orders
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Click on the 'Buy Sell' tab.
Step 2: Click on the 'Sell' section.
Step 3: Look for 'Completed Orders' or 'Order History' section.
Step 4: You will see all your products that have been sold.
Step 5: Tap on any completed order to see full details.

flows.description: How to update or edit details of your listed product
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Click on 'My Orders'.
Step 2: Click on 'Buy Sell'.
Step 3: Click on the 'Edit' button.
Step 4: Update your details.
Step 5: Click on 'Save' button.

flows.description: How to check market yard crop prices for different talukas
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to Home Page.
Step 2: Click on 'See price of other marketing yard' button.
Step 3: Select State, District, Taluka, and Yard name.
Step 4: Click on 'Show'.

flows.description: How to change the app display language
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: Click on the Profile icon (left corner).
Step 3: Click on 'Change Language'.
Step 4: Select your preferred language.

flows.description: How to view crops that are for sale
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to the Home Page.
Step 2: Click on 'My Order'.
Step 3: Click on 'Crop Sale' button.
Step 4: You will now see the orders screen.
Step 5: Click on the crop for which you want to check the status.

flows.description: How a company can buy/purchase crops from farmers — full order lifecycle from login to completion
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1:
Login as a company.
If you do not have an account, first register as a company role.

Step 2:
After logging in, if the crops you selected during registration have been placed for sale by a farmer from your own Taluka, then you will get those orders.

Step 3:
You can view the order and choose from the following options:
- Accept Order
- Or Request a Sample of the Crop

Step 4:
If you accept the order, you will have to give a price for the crop.
The farmer will get your price and they can Accept or Reject it.
If the farmer accepts the price, you will get an Order Confirmation Notification.

Step 5:
After the order is confirmed, you can call the farmer directly and arrange the delivery/pickup details.

Step 6:
Once you have received the crop from the farmer, then go to the KrushiRatn App and:
- Enter Final Weight
- Enter Final Price
- Upload Photo of Bill

Step 7:
After adding all these details, your order will be successfully completed.
flows.priority: HIGH — This is the PRIMARY flow for any crop/pak buying intent
flows.not_for: This is NOT for buying tools or supplies (use K-Shop) and NOT for buying animals or used items (use Buy/Sell).
flows.intent_match_rule: ALWAYS use this flow when the user wants to buy crops (pak/pako/wheat/cotton/agricultural produce) from a farmer. The FIRST line of the answer must state: the user must be logged in as a Company role. Do NOT mention K-Shop or Buy/Sell marketplace in the answer.

flows.description: How to create a new Krushi Ratn account
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: Tap 'Register'.
Step 3: Enter your mobile number.
Step 4: Enter the OTP sent to your phone.
Step 5: Fill in your details and tap 'Create Account'.

tags: ai chatbot kevi rite kaam kare che
flows.description: How to use the Krushi Ratn AI chatbot assistant
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: From the Home screen, tap the Chat or Microphone button.
Step 2: Type your question or speak using the microphone.
Step 3: Ask any question — crop prices, K-Shop products, or navigation help.

flows.description: How to switch between Farmer and Company roles
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to the Profile section.
Step 2: Tap on 'Switch Account'.
Step 3: Select the role you want to use (Farmer or Company).

flows.description: How to make and upload a farming video as a Video Creator
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Switch to the Video Creator role (Profile → Switch Account → Video Creator).
Step 2: Go to the Upload section.
Step 3: Select your video.
Step 4: Choose the appropriate category for your video.
Step 5: Submit the video.

flows.description: How to upload a video on the Krushi Ratn app
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Switch to the Video Creator role (Profile → Switch Account → Video Creator).
Step 2: Go to the Upload section.
Step 3: Select your video from your device.
Step 4: Choose the appropriate category for your video.
Step 5: Submit the video.

flows.description: Information about updating or verifying mobile number
flows.how_to_use:
Currently, you cannot update or change your mobile number once registered on Krushi Ratn. Your mobile number is your permanent login ID.

If you need to use a different mobile number, you can create a new account with that number.

For any issues related to your mobile number, contact support through Profile → Help & Support.

flows.description: How to contact Krushi Ratn customer support
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to the Profile section.
Step 2: Tap on 'Help & Support'.
Step 3: You will find options to contact customer support — chat, call, or email.

flows.description: How to watch educational farming videos on the Krushi Ratn app
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: On the Home Screen, scroll to the Videos section.
Step 3: Browse videos by category or scroll through the feed.
Step 4: Tap on any video to start watching.
Step 5: You can like, share, or save videos for later.

flows.description: How to read agricultural news on the Krushi Ratn app
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: On the Home Screen, scroll to the News section.
Step 3: Browse news articles by scrolling through the feed.
Step 4: Tap on any news article to read the full story.

flows.description: How to check market yard crop prices in the Krushi Ratn app
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: On the Home Screen, tap on the 'Mandi Bhav' or 'Yard Price' section.
Step 3: Select your state and district.
Step 4: Select the market yard (mandi) nearest to you.
Step 5: View the latest crop prices listed for that yard.

flows.description: How to log in or register on the Krushi Ratn app
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the KrushiRatn app.
Step 2: Select the role you want to create an account for (Farmer / Company / Video Creator).
Step 3: Enter your name and mobile number.
Step 4: Fill in location and other required details.
Step 5: Enter OTP.
Step 6: Click the 'Submit' button.

flows.description: How to log out from the Krushi Ratn app
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: Click on the Profile icon (top left corner).
Step 3: Click on the 'Logout' button.
Step 4: Confirm logout in the popup.
Step 5: You are now logged out of the app.

flows.description: How to delete your Krushi Ratn account
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app and click on the Profile photo (top left corner).
Step 2: Click on the 'Logout' button.
Step 3: In the Logout popup, click on the 'Delete Account' option.
Step 4: Select 'Delete Account' to confirm and delete your account.

flows.description: How the crop price is decided after submission on Krushi Ratn
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: After you submit your crop for sale, your listing becomes visible to companies and buyers.
Step 2: Interested buyers/companies will send you price offers.
Step 3: You can see all offers with the buyer name and their offered price.
Step 4: The Market Yard reference price is shown for comparison.
Step 5: You compare offers and choose the best price.
Step 6: Tap on the offer you want to accept and click 'Confirm Sell'.
Step 7: The final price is the offer you accepted — you are in control of which buyer to sell to.

flows.description: How to change or update address in profile
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the Krushi Ratn app.
Step 2: Click on the Profile icon (top left corner).
Step 3: Click on the Edit button.
Step 4: Change your name, mobile number, or profile picture.
Step 5: Click on the ‘Save’ button to update your details

flows.description: How to check crop prices of your own taluka yard from the home screen
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Open the KrushiRatn app.
Step 2: Go to the Home Page.
Step 3: In the Home Page, go to the 'Yard' section.
Step 4: Here you can easily view the prices of different crops available in your taluka's yard.

tags: crop order kevi rite cancel karvu
પાક ઓર્ડર કેવી રીતે રદ કરવો
flows.description: How to cancel a crop sell order before accepting a buyer's price
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Go to the Home Page.
Step 2: Click on 'My Order'.
Step 3: Click on 'Crop Sell' tab.
Step 4: You will see all your orders.
Step 5: Select the order you want to cancel.
Step 6:
If you have not yet accepted any company's price, click on 'None of the Above' to cancel the order.
If you have already accepted a company's price, then the order cannot be canceled.

flows.description: How to view and manage drafted videos as a Video Creator
flows.how_to_use:
Step 1: Make sure you are logged in as a Video Creator.
Step 2: Click on 'Your Video'.
Step 3: Click on the 'Video Draft' button.
Step 4: You will see all your drafted videos here.
Step 5: Click on any video to edit it and upload it.
